title: Compose a query with 4 pipe steps using shared binding
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.find_verified_active_in_team/1` as a pipe chain starting from `User`. Pipe: `where([u], u.active == true)`, `where([u], not is_nil(u.email_verified_at))`, `where([u], u.team_id == ^team_id)`, `order_by([u], asc: u.name)`, then `Repo.all`. Use pipe syntax exclusively. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Four-step pipe chain with pinned variable. Moderate if comfortable, fiddly if not.
